name: honeycomb
description: Self-supporting hex-hole vent cutter for print-safe ventilation apertures. Module honeycomb_vent(width, height, depth, cell, wall) produces flat-top hexagon patterns tuned for reliable bridging (<=5mm span ceiling per design-for-print guidelines). Prints support-free by construction.
sources: Flat-top hex column-stacking geometry with boundary-crossing safety checks
